use_cases: Button component for triggering actions in web applications
Form submission buttons with multiple visual variants and sizes
Call-to-action buttons for user interface interactions
Navigation trigger buttons with accessible focus states
Versatile button with asChild pattern support for composition
ai_summary: A versatile Button component built with React, Radix UI Slot, and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles with size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes accessibility features such as focus-visible ring states, keyboard navigation, and disabled state handling. Uses cn() utility for className composition and supports composition via asChild prop.
